query: SELECT ig.id, ig.name, ig.overview, ig.gettingThere, p.id as place_id, p.name as place_name FROM island_guides ig LEFT JOIN places p ON ig.placeId = p.id WHERE ig.name LIKE '%Fuvahmulah%' OR p.name LIKE '%Fuvahmulah%';
